name: Spicy Black Bean Chili
recipeIngredient: 15 oz can southwestern-style black beans with cumin and chili spices, undrained
14.5 oz can diced peeled tomatoes with chili or salsa seasonings, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Heat over medium-high heat until hot. Add onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender.
2. Stir in black beans, tomatoes, and corn. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 to 8 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
3. Sprinkle with cheese and cover. Cook an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
320 Calories, 11 g Fat, 1270 mg Sodium
